all.name: _pv_lecture_talkinghead_raw.mp4.jpg
issues: Slightly soft focus on some background elements, but not unnatural for a video still.
Books on the shelf are somewhat generic and lack distinct titles, but this is common in stock or casual source assets.
No visible text on notebooks or tablet screen, which is plausible for a raw talking head asset.

all.name: brand_look_reference.jpg
issues: Slightly too perfect arrangement and lighting may hint at AI generation, but not overtly artificial.
Some objects (plant leaves, pen, mug handle) have a slightly rendered look upon close inspection.
Background books and jar of pens are a bit generic and lack fine detail, but not incoherent.

all.name: meridian_logo.png
issues: Background is white, not transparent as specified; otherwise, the design is clean, purposeful, and matches the brief with correct colors, crisp edges, and clear text.
